comment: Scorch — aggressive high-gain amp + cab. Tight pre high-pass, cascaded asymmetric soft-clip stages with interstage filtering, a scoopable tone stack (Bass/Mid/Treble/Presence), and a synthesized 4x12-style cab via short FIR convolution. The realistic algorithmic stand-in for NAM-style amp tone. Desktop preview implements the full DSP; pedal C port is staged (a baked cab IR FIR + clipping).
gid_comment: 0x03 = Drive category. NOTE: on MS-70CDR a custom Drive effect may need a stock Drive installed to appear in the device browser.
fxid_comment: 0x01C9. Above the repo's used range; distinct from the other customs. Verify uniqueness before flashing.

params.name: Gain
params.comment: Preamp gain / amount of high-gain distortion.

params.name: Mid
params.comment: Mid peak (~700 Hz). Low = scooped metal voicing.

audio_nop_comment: Pedal C port starts as a UI-only smoke build; full DSP validated on desktop first.
